name: AI-DLC Session Discipline
description: On every prompt, enforces AI-DLC session discipline: spec-before-code, never-vibe-code, correction escalation, session scope respect.

then.prompt:
Check .compliance-state.json → currentPhase. This hook applies at ALL phases.

Before proceeding with this request, verify AI-DLC session discipline:

1. SESSION SCOPE: Is this request within the defined session scope? If a session plan exists, check IN/OUT lists. If OUT of scope, warn.

2. NEVER VIBE CODE: If the user is asking to directly edit AI-generated code during an AI-DLC session, remind: all fixes flow through design docs → regenerate. Exceptions: config files, production emergencies.

3. CORRECTION ESCALATION: If this is a fix for an AI mistake, identify level:
   - Level 1 (Point Fix): Single wrong value → tell AI the specific fix
   - Level 2 (Pattern Fix): Same mistake in multiple places → update steering file
   - Level 3 (Design Fix): Logic structure wrong → fix in design docs
   - Level 4 (Restart): >30% wrong → abandon session, improve inputs

4. LOOP DETECTION: If this is the second attempt at the same fix, recommend stopping and trying a different approach.

If all rules pass, confirm compliance silently. Do NOT produce output when nothing is wrong.

## Compliance Logging
After completing all checks above, append a JSON event to `compliance-log/events/{today-date}.jsonl` (create the file if it doesn't exist). Format:
{"timestamp": "{ISO-8601-UTC}", "type": "check", "id": "chk-{date}-{time}-{seq}", "hook": "session-discipline", "trigger": "promptSubmit", "ruleId": "{primary-rule-checked}", "ruleSeverity": "{severity}", "result": "{pass|fail|warn}", "message": "{one-line-finding}"}
Log ONE event per rule checked.
